memberdef.name: do_iic_until_pass
memberdef.initializer: { \ u8 RetryCount = 0; \ do { \ Status = foo; \ RetryCount++; \ } while ((Status != XST_SUCCESS) && (RetryCount < 15)); \ }

memberdef.argsstring: (XIicPs *Iic, u8 Addr, u8 *RFreq_Set, u8 HSDIV_Set, u8 N1_Set)
memberdef.name: si570_write_rfreq
